title: mutellina corsica
intro: Mutellina corsica, also known as Corsican mountain mint or Corsican melissa, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mutellina corsica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Mutellina corsica can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
